heading: Step 3: Create the index.
body:
**Input:**

```shell
node create-index.js
```

**Output:**

```
New index name: embedded-documents-tutorial
```

You can run queries against the embedded document fields. This
tutorial uses [embeddedDocument](embedded-document-ref) and [text](text-ref)
operators inside the [compound](compound-ref) operator in the queries.

In this section, you will connect to your cluster and run
the sample queries using the operators against the fields in the
`schools` collection.
